reason: Verified browser-use feature: agent successfully opened a browser, navigated to https://example.com, retrieved the page title "Example Domain", and returned the correct response.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with Gamut application showing agent list.
Found and clicked agent "QA-20260702-171548-0zs0" in sidebar — Navigated to agent's configuration page with session ready for messaging.
Typed message into input field — Message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." successfully entered into the message input field.
Clicked send button — Message sent successfully, agent transitioned to "working" state and created a new session titled "Browser Page Title Lookup".
Waited for agent response — Agent completed browser operations (ToolSearch → Open Browser → Get State → Response) within 17 seconds.

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Screenshot confirms the agent's final response states "The page title is 'Example Domain'." as required, demonstrating successful browser navigation and page title retrieval.
